protein_name: Involved in T-cell antigen receptor mediated signaling. Highly expressed in spleen, thymus and peripheral blood leukocytes. Highly expressed also in T-cell and monocytic cell lines, expressed at lower level in B-cell lines. Not detected in fibroblast or neuroblastoma cell lines. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cell-cell junction; cytoplasm; cytosol; plasma membrane raft; TCR signalosome
raw_fields.Biological Process: cell surface receptor protein tyrosine kinase signaling pathway; immune response; immune system process; intracellular signal transduction; mast cell activation; positive regulation of protein kinase activity; T cell receptor signaling pathway
